files.name: README.md
files.content:
========== MarkOS [Version 1.0.0-AI] ==========
A Personal Folio & Nostalgia Experiment
---------------------------------------------------------

[SYSTEM OVERVIEW]
MarkOS is a web-based operating system experience inspired by 
classic operating systems and the golden age of the web. This 
site hosts my portfolio (also available at mark-murphy.me) 
 and serves as a living laboratory for human-AI collaboration.

[THE PHILOSOPHY]
I've been building for the web since the days of Flash intros, 
ActionScript, and MySpace layouts. For a long time, that raw 
sense of \"wonder\" felt like it had moved into the shadows—until 
AI arrived. 

AI has closed the gap between the \"Spark\" of an idea and the 
\"Making\" of the thing. MarkOS is a tribute to that excitement.

[TECHNICAL ARCHITECTURE]
Built upon the incredible ryOS 8.2 boilerplate by Ry. I am 
proudly standing on the shoulders of giants to bring this to life.

- Core: React 18, TypeScript, Vite, TailwindCSS
- Intelligence: Crafted using Claude Code & Cursor
- Audio: WaveSurfer.js & Tone.js for authentic system sounds
- Emulator: Virtual PC powered by DOSBox

[BUILT-IN APPLICATIONS]
- Finder: Browse my work and files.
- Control Panels: Customize your experience (Wallpapers/Themes).
- Internet Explorer: A Time Machine to reimagined AI sites.
- Virtual PC: Play PC classics like SimCity and Doom.
- Chats: Use the built-in chat to send me a message directly.
- MacPaint: Classic bitmap graphics for the creative soul.

[EASTER EGGS & CHALLENGES]
MarkOS contains hidden tributes to legendary designers who 
shaped the web as we know it. Some are tucked in folders, 
others are hidden in code. 

CHALLENGE: Can you find all the designer Easter Eggs?

[GETTING STARTED]
1. Double-click any icon to launch.
2. Use the Apple menu (🍎) or Control panel under the start menu for system functions.
3. Change your wallpaper and theme to suit your era.
4. Any changes will save to local storage.

[CREDITS]
Special thanks to Ry (https://github.com/ryokun6/ryos) for 
the foundational code. To the AI tools that acted as my 
co-pilot. And to you, for exploring.

Stay curious. Close the gap. LET'S GO! 

- Mark Murphy
---------------------------------------------------------
EOF - All your base are belong to us

files.name: Quick Tips.md
files.content:
# Quick Tips

## Using Apps
- Launch apps from the Finder, Desktop, or Apple menu
- Multiple apps can run simultaneously
- Windows can be moved, resized, and minimized
- TextEdit now supports multiple windows - open different documents simultaneously
- Use Control Panels to customize your experience

## Finder
- Browse files in Documents, Applications, and Trash
- Navigate with back/forward buttons or path bar
- Sort files by name, kind, size, or date
- Multiple view options (icons, list)
- Move files to Trash and empty when needed
- Monitor available storage space
- Smart file opening detects if files are already open in TextEdit

## TextEdit
- Create and edit rich text documents
- Format text with bold, italic, and underline
- Align text and create ordered/unordered lists
- Use slash commands (/) for quick formatting
- Support for markdown syntax
- Task list support with checkboxes
- Auto-saves your work
- Export documents when needed
- **NEW**: Multi-window support - open multiple documents at once
- **NEW**: Each window maintains independent state
- **NEW**: Smart instance management prevents duplicate windows

## MacPaint
- Classic bitmap graphics editor
- Multiple drawing tools and patterns
- Shape tools with fill options
- Selection and move capabilities
- Image file import/export
- Undo/redo support

## Soundboard
- Create multiple custom soundboards
- Record sounds directly from your microphone
- Enhanced synth effects and processing
- Customize with emojis and titles
- Play sounds with clicks or number keys (1-9)
- View sound waveforms with WaveSurfer.js
- Import/export soundboards for sharing
- Auto-saves your recordings
- Choose input device
- Toggle waveform/emoji display

## Synth
- Play using on-screen keyboard or computer keys
- Choose between multiple waveforms:
  - Sine wave (smooth, pure tones)
  - Square wave (rich, buzzy sounds)
  - Sawtooth (bright, sharp tones)
  - Triangle (soft, hollow sounds)
- Add effects:
  - Reverb for space and depth
  - Delay for echo effects
  - Distortion for gritty tones
- Save and load custom presets
- MIDI keyboard support
- Classic synthesizer interface
- Real-time parameter control

## Photo Booth
- Take photos with your webcam
- Apply real-time effects:
  - Green Tint
  - High Contrast
  - Warm Vintage
  - Soft Sepia
  - Soft Focus
  - Black & White
  - Inverted
  - Green Boost
- Adjust brightness and contrast
- Multi-photo sequence mode
- Built-in photo gallery
- Export photos to Files
- Multiple camera support
- Flash effect on capture

## Control Panels
- Customize system appearance
  - Choose from tiled patterns or photos
  - Multiple categories of wallpapers
  - Real-time preview
- Adjust sound settings
  - Enable/disable UI sounds
  - Configure typing synthesis
  - Choose synth presets
- Manage system
  - Backup all settings
  - Restore from backup
  - Reset to defaults
  - Format file system

## Internet Explorer
- Browse historical web content
- Time travel with Wayback Machine
- Classic System 7 style interface
- Add websites to favorites
- View content from different years

## Chats with Ryo
- Natural conversation with Ryo AI
- Control system through chat
- Launch and manage apps
- Edit documents directly
- Get help with features
- Ask about design and concepts
- **NEW**: Push-to-talk voice messages with real-time transcription
- **NEW**: Text-to-speech for AI responses with word highlighting
- **NEW**: Nudge system (👋) for context-aware interactions
- **NEW**: ryOS FM DJ mode - Ryo becomes a radio DJ when music is playing
- **NEW**: Advanced tool calling for system integration
- **NEW**: Speech synthesis with volume controls
- **NEW**: Join chat rooms with @ryo mentions

## Videos
- VCR-style video playlist player
- Add and manage YouTube videos
- Shuffle and repeat modes
- LCD display with scrolling titles
- Classic CD player controls
- Playlist management
- Local storage for favorites

## Virtual PC
- Play classic DOS games
- Doom, SimCity, and more
- Save game states
- Full DOS environment
- Keyboard and mouse support

## iPod
- 1st-generation iPod-style music player
- Import YouTube URLs to build your music library
- Classic click-wheel navigation
- Shuffle and loop playback modes
- Create playlists and organize tracks
- **NEW**: Time-synced lyrics with multi-language translation
- **NEW**: Interactive lyric offset adjustment via gestures
- **NEW**: Multiple alignment modes (Focus Three, Alternating, Center)
- **NEW**: Chinese character variants (Traditional/Simplified)
- **NEW**: Korean romanization support
- **NEW**: Fullscreen lyrics mode with video support
- **NEW**: Real-time lyric highlighting during playback
- **NEW**: Gesture controls for lyric timing adjustments
- Library persisted locally for offline playback
